headline: TRMB Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Recurring Revenue Strength
summary: Trimble beat Q1'26 earnings and revenue estimates as ARR hit $2.43B, margins expand, and raises 2026 guidance.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Trimble, Lowers Price Target to $70
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jerry Revich   maintains Trimble (NASDAQ:TRMB) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $79 to $70.

headline: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on Trimble, Lowers Price Target to $80
summary: Oppenheimer  analyst Kristen Owen   maintains Trimble (NASDAQ:TRMB) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $86 to $80.

headline: Reddit and Ethan Allen have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Reddit shares rebound as Q1 revenue jumped 69% and daily active users rose 17%, fueling analyst upgrades and renewed momentum.

headline: Trimble Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Trimble (NASDAQ:TRMB) reported first-quarter 2026 results that exceeded management’s expectations on both the top and bottom line and prompted the company to raise its full-year outlook.
